status_meanings.restored-draft: Readable restored translation exists, but source-audit metadata is incomplete.
status_meanings.source-audited-draft: Verse-by-verse source-language review has been applied for major wording, grammar, context, and interpretive choices. Final scholarly review may still refine details.
status_meanings.source-critical: Textual variants and manuscript witnesses have also been reviewed where relevant.

books.notes: Genesis has full chapter coverage with source-audited-draft restored translation and mystical companion layers. Later pass should normalize glossary coverage, schema validation, and source-critical variant notes.

chapters.notes: Creation; embedded source-audit pass complete.
Garden, human from ground, breath, ezer kenegdo, body without shame.
Serpent, shame, consequence, mortality, guarded tree of life.
Cain/Abel, sin crouching at doorway, blood crying from ground, Cain sign, Lamech, Seth/Enosh.
Adam-to-Noah genealogy, image/likeness, mortality formula, Enoch walking with God, Noah comfort wordplay.
Sons of God, Nephilim, corruption, divine grief, Noah righteousness, ark and covenant.
Ark entry, clean/not-clean animals, flood waters, breath of life, remnant.
Divine remembering, wind over waters, raven/dove, altar, promise of creation rhythms.
Post-flood blessing, blood/life boundary, covenant bow, Noah vineyard, Canaan warning.
Table of Nations, Nimrod, Babel/Shinar setup, languages/lands/families/nations.
Babel, language confusion, scattering, Shem-to-Abram genealogy, Sarai barrenness, journey toward Canaan.
Abram call, blessing, Sarai in Egypt, sister-wife danger, plague/intervention.
Abram/Lot separation, lifted eyes, land promise, Mamre altar.
Kings war, Lot rescue, Abram the Hebrew, Melchizedek, El Elyon, refusal of Sodom wealth.
Vision, trust reckoned righteousness, covenant cutting, exile prophecy, fire theophany.
Sarai/Hagar/Abram, affliction, Ishmael naming, El Roi, Beer-lahai-roi.
El Shaddai, Abraham/Sarah renaming, circumcision covenant, Isaac/Ishmael blessings.
Mamre visitors, Sarah laughter, too wonderful, Sodom outcry, Abraham intercession.
Sodom mob violence, Lot rescue, destruction, Lot's wife, Moab/Ammon origin.
Abimelech/Sarah, dream warning, integrity, Abraham prophet/intercessor, womb healing.
Isaac birth/laughter, Hagar and Ishmael wilderness rescue, God hears, Beersheba covenant.
Akedah, test, hineni, YHWH-yireh, ram provision, blessing oath, Rebekah setup.
Sarah death, Machpelah purchase, Abraham as sojourner, first secured landholding.
Rebekah betrothal, servant oath, chesed/emet, consent to go, Isaac comforted.
Abraham death, Ishmael line, Isaac/Rebekah twins, Jacob/Esau, birthright sale.
Isaac famine, Rebekah sister-wife pattern, wells, Rehoboth, Beersheba oath, Esau marriages.
Isaac blessing, Jacob/Rebekah deception, Esau bitter cry, stolen blessing, Jacob flight setup.
Jacob sent to Laban, Bethel dream, stairway, gate of heavens, vow and tenth.
Jacob at well, Rachel, Laban deception, Leah/Rachel, Reuben/Simeon/Levi/Judah naming.
Rachel/Leah rivalry, Bilhah/Zilpah sons, mandrakes, Joseph, Jacob's wages and flocks.
Jacob leaves Laban, Rachel teraphim, Laban pursuit, Galeed/Mizpah covenant boundary.
Mahanaim, fear of Esau, Jacob prayer/gifts, Jabbok wrestling, Israel naming, Peniel limp.
Jacob/Esau reconciliation, face of Divine, gift/blessing, Succoth, Shechem altar.
Dinah, Shechem/Hamor negotiation, brothers' deceit, circumcision condition, Simeon/Levi retaliation, plunder.
Bethel return, household purification, Israel name reaffirmed, Rachel death, Benjamin, Isaac death.
Esau/Edom genealogy, Seir, Horites, Edomite chiefs and kings before Israelite monarchy.
Joseph favored tunic, dreams, brothers' hatred, pit, sale to Egypt, Jacob mourning.
Judah and Tamar, levirate duty, pledge/recognition, Judah's confession, Perez/Zerah.
Joseph in Potiphar's house, refusal, false accusation, prison, Eternal with Joseph.
Cupbearer and baker dreams, Joseph interpretations, restoration/judgment, forgotten Joseph.
Pharaoh dreams, Joseph interprets, seven years abundance/famine, Joseph elevated over Egypt.
Brothers go to Egypt, Joseph recognizes them, spy test, Simeon held, Benjamin required.
Judah surety, Benjamin brought, Joseph's house meal, Simeon released, Benjamin favored.
Silver cup test, Benjamin accused, Judah intercedes and offers himself instead.
Joseph reveals himself, divine sending/providence, reconciliation, Jacob revived.
Israel descends to Egypt, Beer-sheba vision, seventy persons, Joseph/Jacob reunion.
Goshen settlement, Jacob blesses Pharaoh, famine administration, burial oath.
Ephraim and Manasseh adopted/blessed, crossed hands, younger-before-older, return promise.
Jacob's final sayings over sons, Judah royal imagery, Joseph blessing, burial command.
Jacob burial, brothers fear, Joseph forgiveness/providence, Joseph death and bones oath.

next_actions: Begin Job pilot: source-audited draft plus mystical companion, with special attention to ha-satan/the Accuser, suffering, divine justice, and counsel language.
Add glossary files for recurring terms introduced in Genesis 1-50.
Add schema validation for compact and full chapter JSON variants.
Later promote Genesis chapters to source-critical after textual variant and manuscript witness review.
